text:
There once was a cat that lived inside a house. The cat loved to climb up on things and would sleep among the curtains. It got very lonely without human company, though.

One day, the cat sat on the kitchen window sill and watched birds zoom past. It decided that flying outside would be a wonderful adventure. With no fear of heights, it fluttered off outside and gracefully glided down into the evening breezes.

The cat soared above the garden, delighted by the feeling of freedom. It saw families playing, fireworks lighting up the sky, and even spotted a squirrel.

About mid-flight, it felt a tug at its tail. It landed quietly on a bush. A tiny, furry friend jumped down from the branch! It was a rabbit!

The cat meowed to welcome the rabbit. This wasn't just any rabbit—this one was a fuzzy little friend they'd never met. It nibbled at some dried grass the cat provided.

The rabbit became a buddy. They played in
